prompts.name: lavanda_livre
prompts.text: Medium format RAW capture, professional nature photography. Lavender fields of Hortobágy National Park, Hungary. Golden hour illumination bathes the undulating purple landscape, casting long shadows on dewy grasses. Rich textures of lavender heads and stems contrast against earthy tones of soil and wildflowers. A wooden fence runs along the foreground, dividing the scene into a tranquil pastoral setting and vast expanse of vibrant hues. A lone cypress tree adds depth and intrigue to the composition. Overhead, clouds slowly drift across a clear blue sky, emphasizing the serene calm of the scene. Hasselblad X2D, 45mm f/3.5, f/8, ISO 64, ultra realistic, National Geographic.

prompts.name: lavanda_livre_2
prompts.text:
RAW photo, professional nature photography:
Lavender Fields of Hidcote Manor Gardens, England
Golden hour illumination filters through the delicate lavender blooms, casting a soft, warm glow over the undulating hills and historic manor in the distance. The rich purples and blues of the lavender fields contrast with the lush greens of surrounding foliage and the creamy stone walls of the estate. Textures abound from the silky petals to the rough-hewn stone, all framed by a picturesque wrought iron gate. The atmosphere is serene yet vibrant, filled with the sweet aroma of lavender in bloom. Composition: Rule of Thirds, with the manor positioned along the upper horizontal line and the lavender fields below, leading the eye through the scene. Sony A7R V, 24mm f/1.4, f/2, ISO 3200, ultra realistic, National Geographic.

prompts.name: lavanda_livre_3
prompts.text: Aerial drone RAW photograph, professional nature photography. Provence, France, near Sénanque Abbey. Golden hour light bathes a sea of lavender fields, their vibrant purple hues contrasting with the sun-kissed cobblestone pathways. Dusty, textured hills in the distance, dotted with cypress trees and old stone buildings, create depth. Misty air enhances the ethereal atmosphere as it rises from the fields, casting a soft, surreal glow. Composition focuses on the Abbey's silhouette against the lavender backdrop, with diagonal lines of the pathway leading to the heart of the scene. DJI Mavic 3 Pro, 24mm equivalent, f/8, ISO 100, ultra realistic, National Geographic.

elementos: lavender rows converging to vanishing point
